description: Implement the missing commercial search capability without changing preview semantics. Add an intent-named Ash interface that takes a DiscoveryProgram, executes the existing bounded Exa query/search/dedupe/ranking behavior, and persists only LeadPreviewRun plus LeadPreviewCandidate telemetry and provenance. It must create no Acquisition Findings, Organizations, DiscoveryRecords, Signals, or Pursuits and must never auto-promote. Keep seed_candidates only as an explicit test fixture until legacy retirement. Production scheduling must remain feature-flagged off by default until fx2.21 shared budget controls and fx2.7 durable execution are complete. Acceptance: a scheduler-facing integration test with an Exa fixture starts from program industries/regions/search terms, persists ranked candidates and real cost, respects the existing per-run ceiling, redacts the runtime-managed EXA_API_KEY from logs/errors/metadata, and proves zero manually seeded candidates are required.
title: Connect scheduled commercial discovery to live Exa search
